channel.title: Supply-Chain on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Supply-Chain on ExitCode0

item.title: Building a Dependency Audit Extension for Pi Agent - and What Mini Shai Hulud Taught Me About npm Supply Chains
item.description: I built a TypeScript extension for Pi Agent that audits installed npm packages against the advisory database on startup. Here's how it works, what it actually protects against, and where it falls short.

item.title: How to Secure a Python Project Against Supply Chain Attacks: Dependabot, pip-audit, and Branch Protection
item.description: Supply chain attacks like Mini Shai-Hulud hit PyPI in 2026. Here's how to harden a Python project with pinned deps, pip-audit in CI, Dependabot, and branch protection.
